scope.target: Create a dedicated top-level skill for AI context cleanup and documentation governance.
scope.dependency_radius: Skill taxonomy, wrappers, and human-facing guide indexes.
constraints: Do not route AI context cleanup to bdd-gwt-test-designer.
Keep SKILL.md concise and use references for details.

user_constraints: Each skill should have a clear responsibility and avoid unsuitable skill routing.

steps: Create canonical skill spec and references.
Update skill registries and wrapper indexes.
validation: Search for BDD skill references in AI context cleanup guidance.
Confirm wrappers point to canonical spec.
